text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, October 27. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Researching rover power systems in depth. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Prepping school lunches for the week. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Healthy choices are great. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Neighborhood connections are fun. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that checking on some house maintenance items. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's get that resolved. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Let's organize the menu. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that having dinner with our friends tonight. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've mapped the locations. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is practicing Minuet in G for the upcoming piano recital. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. That's a big step. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
